name: Lenta PLC
summary: Lenta PLC, together with its subsidiaries, develops and operates hypermarket and supermarket stores. As of December 31, 2020, it operated 254 hypermarkets and 139 supermarkets in 89 cities across Russia. The company was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Saint Petersburg, Russia. Lenta PLC is a subsidiary of Severgroup LLC.
